'''âg-l-z''' ('''kagalaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monotype|monotype]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monotype|monotype]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-l-z
|-
! Lemma
| kagalaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigalaz|thigalaz]] || [[word:jigalaz|jigalaz]] || [[word:shigalaz|shigalaz]] || [[word:kigalaz|kigalaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugalaz|thuthugalaz]] || [[word:jujugalaz|jujugalaz]] || [[word:shushugalaz|shushugalaz]] || [[word:kukugalaz|kukugalaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugalaz|thugalaz]] || [[word:jugalaz|jugalaz]] || [[word:shugalaz|shugalaz]] || [[word:kugalaz|kugalaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugalaz|thugalaz]] || [[word:jugalaz|jugalaz]] || [[word:shugalaz|shugalaz]] || [[word:kugalaz|kugalaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegalaz|thegalaz]] || [[word:jegalaz|jegalaz]] || [[word:shegalaz|shegalaz]] || [[word:kegalaz|kegalaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogalaz|thothogalaz]] || [[word:jojogalaz|jojogalaz]] || [[word:shoshogalaz|shoshogalaz]] || [[word:kokogalaz|kokogalaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogalaz|thogalaz]] || [[word:jogalaz|jogalaz]] || [[word:shogalaz|shogalaz]] || [[word:kogalaz|kogalaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogalaz|thogalaz]] || [[word:jogalaz|jogalaz]] || [[word:shogalaz|shogalaz]] || [[word:kogalaz|kogalaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgalaz|thĂŠgalaz]] || [[word:jĂŠgalaz|jĂŠgalaz]] || [[word:shĂŠgalaz|shĂŠgalaz]] || [[word:kĂŠgalaz|kĂŠgalaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagalaz|thathagalaz]] || [[word:jajagalaz|jajagalaz]] || [[word:shashagalaz|shashagalaz]] || [[word:kakagalaz|kakagalaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagalaz|thagalaz]] || [[word:jagalaz|jagalaz]] || [[word:shagalaz|shagalaz]] || [[word:kagalaz|kagalaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagalaz|thagalaz]] || [[word:jagalaz|jagalaz]] || [[word:shagalaz|shagalaz]] || [[word:kagalaz|kagalaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagalaz|shagalaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagalaz|goshagalaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagalaz|gokishagalaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagalaznĂŒ|shagalaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagalaznknĂŒ|goshagalaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagalaznĂŒ|gokishagalaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagalazshĂ«|shagalazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagalaznkshĂ«|goshagalaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagalazshĂ«|gokishagalazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagalazro|shagalazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagalaznkro|goshagalaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagalazro|gokishagalazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagalazmu|shagalazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagalaznkmu|goshagalaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagalazmu|gokishagalazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagalazsher|shagalazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagalaznksher|goshagalaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagalazsher|gokishagalazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagalazng|shagalazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagalaznkng|goshagalaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagalazng|gokishagalazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagalazya|shagalazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagalaznkya|goshagalaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagalazya|gokishagalazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagalazyam|shagalazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagalaznkyam|goshagalaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagalazyam|gokishagalazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagalaznĂŒshĂ«|shagalaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagalaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshagalaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagalaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishagalaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagalaznĂŒro|shagalaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagalaznknĂŒro|goshagalaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagalaznĂŒro|gokishagalaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagalaznĂŒmu|shagalaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagalaznknĂŒmu|goshagalaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagalaznĂŒmu|gokishagalaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagalazshĂ«nĂŒ|shagalazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagalaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagalaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagalazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagalazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagalazshĂ«ro|shagalazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagalaznkshĂ«ro|goshagalaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagalazshĂ«ro|gokishagalazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagalazshĂ«mu|shagalazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagalaznkshĂ«mu|goshagalaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagalazshĂ«mu|gokishagalazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagalazronĂŒ|shagalazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagalaznkronĂŒ|goshagalaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagalazronĂŒ|gokishagalazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagalazroshĂ«|shagalazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagalaznkroshĂ«|goshagalaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagalazroshĂ«|gokishagalazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagalazromu|shagalazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagalaznkromu|goshagalaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagalazromu|gokishagalazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagalazmunĂŒ|shagalazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagalaznkmunĂŒ|goshagalaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagalazmunĂŒ|gokishagalazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagalazmushĂ«|shagalazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagalaznkmushĂ«|goshagalaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagalazmushĂ«|gokishagalazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagalazmuro|shagalazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagalaznkmuro|goshagalaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagalazmuro|gokishagalazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
